data.content: Refactor branch already contained the dialog/settings component extractions for the 14 scoped files. Verified zero max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len warnings in scope with eslint; bunx tsc --noEmit passed; bun run test passed (165 files, 2239 tests); bun run build passed. No behavior changes observed. Repo-wide lint still reports unrelated no-unused-vars warnings outside this beat's scope.
